name: @chbrain/khai-composite-standing
description: khai composite content, the standing domain: one persona's rank read at four altitudes at once -- field capital, structural title, deference order, compliance base -- with the transactional moves negotiating between them, read whole across the atom engines it depends on.
license: SEE LICENSE IN LICENSE and LICENSE-CODE

khai.tagline: Standing as composite: one persona ranked at four altitudes at once -- the field's read of their capital, the structure's assigned title, the scene's deference order, the base their influence moves on -- and the drama lives in the disagreements, because the altitudes are separate systems that need not agree and every misalignment is a standing scene.

card.wire: Attaches at Position, over five atoms it declares as dependencies. The root (position_standing.md) reads standing as four ranks held at once: the field's read of the persona's capital (capital), the place a structure assigns (hierarchy), the scene's deference order (status), and the base their influence moves on (power), with the transactional move layer (status-move) negotiating between them scene by scene. The composite adds no fifth rank, only the read across the four the atoms already hold.
card.issue: One bridge state and two bridge motions the atoms cannot stage alone. Misalignment: the held state where the altitudes disagree -- the titled superior nobody defers to, the expert with no title, the moneyed persona the field will not consecrate -- and power without status as the destructive corner. Conversion: rank leaking from one altitude into another, resources hardening into deference, titles minting legitimacy, consecration laundering capital into rank. Enactment: the moment-by-moment moves accumulating into the deference order, rank performed into being or performed away.
card.require: Two altitudes hold the composite. The law: declared once in the project's Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root, so the four-rank read runs wherever its atoms are cast. The link, advisory: a persona living on a misalignment or mid-conversion may link the bridge under Projection, and the audit surfaces the ones left unnamed.
card.enforce: Structure is checked; coherence is judged. The kit verifies the floor: the law is declared, the composite's own members conform, and every hard link into the atoms resolves through a declared dependency. Whether a production's misalignments are staged rather than flattened into one master rank is semantic, taught and reviewed, never failed by the suite.
card.setup: Install the composite; its five atoms arrive as dependencies and their laws with them. Declare the law in the Instructions Knowledge chapter, linking the root. Cast each altitude from its atom as usual -- capital configuration, title position, entry rank, power base, habitual move -- then stage the disagreements: which title is not deferred to, which resource is quietly becoming rank, which persona is performing a standing no altitude has granted. Read the production across the altitudes, never in any single engine's verdict.
